title: Move pesto into `libnetwork/netavark` `Setup()`/`Teardown()`
body: The current pesto logic lives in Podman (`networking_common.go`, `networking_linux.go`) with special-casing for add/delete. It should move into `container-libs` `libnetwork/netavark` `Setup()`/`Teardown()` so Podman doesn't need pesto-specific code. https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4395814422
